prompt: A vintage travel poster illustration of Erhai Lake and Cangshan mountains in a vibrant, mid-century lithograph style. In the foreground, one classic cream-colored vintage car drives away along a winding paved coastal road, framed by bright pink bougainvillea flowers in the top right and bottom right corners. To the right of the road, traditional Chinese buildings with white walls and dark tiled roofs nestle against the hillside, one bearing the Chinese characters "大理" and a red seal. To the left, a deep blue lake features three small wooden boats and three flying seagulls, bordered by a low stone wall. In the background, majestic towering mountains rise under a bright blue sky dotted with fluffy white clouds. In the top left corner, retro typography reads "DALI" in large bold cream serif letters, followed by "YUNNAN, CHINA" in teal sans-serif, "Erhai Lake" in yellow cursive script, and "云南·大理" in small teal Chinese characters.
